note: Acceptance test for any reimplementation of scoring_spec_v2.json's scorer. expected_yhat was computed by this repo's own JSON-only scorer (capstone_phaseb1.json_only_score), which passed the Task-2 parity gate (max diff vs the pkl < 1e-9) on the full corpus -- so these expected values are pkl-verified, not merely self-consistent.

rows.description: all categoricals null, all numeric at median (should reduce to intercept + 0)
extreme long duration, everything else null
all judge scores at scale extremes (max=10)
all judge scores at scale extremes (min=1)
emotion_combination genuinely unseen category (not in top-8, not 'other' explicitly -- exercises pre-remap)
